# our bakery collection

## Burger & Buns

## Choose from a range of different type and sizes;  Brioche / Vegan brioche / Potato / Beetroot / Charcoal / Matcha Green T.    Sizes available: 100g (Hamburger bun) / 60g (Kids burger bun) / 40g (Slider) / 25g (Cocktail) / 110g Hot dog roll.   \\*\\* Call us to discuss products and sizes to suit your needs.

## wholesale enquiries

Tell us what you are looking for and let us work for your needs.

Delivering all over Melbourne and beyond.
